title: The Armed Conflict Survey 2025
gist: Thin IISS landing/contents page for the annual Armed Conflict Survey 2025, listing chapters and free-to-read regional spotlights (Americas, MENA, Asia) rather than substantive analysis. No conflict data or findings are present in this text — it is a chapter table-of-contents and promo page.

insights.claim: IISS publishes an annual Armed Conflict Survey reviewing the political, military and humanitarian dimensions of all active conflicts, with regional spotlights on the Americas, MENA and Asia free to read for 2025.
insights.speaker: IISS
insights.so_what: A primary-source reference for tracking conflict drivers and trends by region; the underlying survey (not this page) is the analyst-grade input for geopolitical risk monitoring.
insights.quote: the Institute’s annual review of the political, military and humanitarian dimensions of all active conflicts
